name: What mistakes should I avoid when dealing with low AI rankings for my law practice?
description: No AI strategy chats, document manually, no delays.[1]

mainEntity.name: What mistakes should I avoid when dealing with low AI rankings for my law practice?

acceptedAnswer.text: No AI strategy chats, document manually, no delays.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Avoid AI for strategy (creates evidence), ignoring TOS immunities, delaying documentation.[1][6] Key factors: privilege myths, hallucination reliance.[1][3] Screenshot everything now, use non-AI research, get human expert fast.[1] Prevention beats cure.
